2026-02-26|Stock Agent Heartbeat - 2026-02-26 18:02|# Stock Agent Heartbeat - 2026-02-26 18:02

## 📊 投资组合状态摘要

### 当前持仓明细
- **ORCL**: 200股 (10%周期 + 10%趋势) - AI云基础设施逻辑
- **NVDA**: 100股 (10%周期) - AI算力核心标的  
- **AMZN**: 10股 @ $200 (1%) - 锁定期至2026-03-11 ✅
- **BABA**: 10股 @ $151.3 (<1%) - **风控待设置** ⚠️
- **短期国债**: 68% - 固收配置
- **现金**: ~0% - 已完全使用

### 仓位结构分析
| 仓位类型 | 当前占比 | 目标占比 | 状态 |
|----------|----------|----------|------|
| 长线仓位 | 0% | 40% | ❌ 缺失 |
| 周期仓位 | 20% | 40% | ⚠️ 需补充 |
| 趋势仓位 | 10% | 20% | ✅ 有空间 |
| **总股票** | **~31%** | **50%** | ⚠️ 需优化 |

## ⚠️ 合规性审查结果

### 紧急待处理事项
1. **BABA风控缺失** 🔴
   - 风险等级：高（完全无保护）
   - 行动要求：立即设置止损$128.6和止盈$227限价单
   - 影响：违反"必须设置风控"原则

2. **ORCL仓位分类确认** ⚠️
   - 问题：10%短线部分是否计入趋势仓位
   - 影响：决定趋势仓位是否超限（当前10% vs 规则20%上限）

### 规则遵守情况
- ✅ **单次交易≤1%**：规则已澄清，理解正确
- ✅ **无红线违规**：无日内交易、做空、衍生品、融资杠杆
- ✅ **限价单执行**：所有持仓均为限价单买入
- ✅ **AMZN合规**：1%仓位+风控已设+锁定期正常

## 🎯 后续行动计划

### 短期行动 (1-2周)
- [ ] **立即**：BABA风控单设置
- [ ] **确认**：ORCL仓位分类
- [ ] **启动**：BABA分批加仓计划（每次≤1%）

### 中期目标 (2-8周)
- [ ] **完成**：BABA 20%目标仓位（10%周期+10%趋势）
- [ ] **建立**：SPY/QQQ 40%长线核心仓位
- [ ] **优化**：整体资产配置至目标比例

## 🔍 市场风险监控

### 个股风险
- **BABA**：中概股政策不确定性，波动性高
- **NVDA**：高估值+技术高位，回调风险增加
- **ORCL**：云业务稳健但估值不低

### 整体市场
- 波动性增加，需谨慎执行分批建仓
- 美股处于高位，长线建仓需关注技术支撑位

## 📝 Heartbeat Notes
- 连续heartbeat检查，状态保持一致
- 待办事项优先级未变
- 准备就绪执行用户确认后的操作

arguments.content:
# 2026-03-01 - Daily Investment Summary

## 📊 Portfolio Status (as of 2026-02-26)

### Current Holdings
- **ORCL**: 200 shares (10% cyclical + 10% trend) - AI cloud infrastructure thesis
- **NVDA**: 100 shares (10% cyclical) - AI compute core holding  
- **AMZN**: 10 shares @ $200 (1%) - Locked until 2026-03-11 ✅
- **BABA**: 10 shares @ $151.3 (<1%) - **Risk control pending** ⚠️
- **Short-term Treasury**: 68% - Fixed income allocation
- **Cash**: ~0% - Fully deployed

### Position Structure Analysis
| Position Type | Current % | Target % | Status |
|---------------|-----------|----------|--------|
| Long-term | 0% | 40% | ❌ Missing |
| Cyclical | 20% | 40% | ⚠️ Needs supplementation |
| Trend | 10% | 20% | ✅ Room available |
| **Total Equity** | **~31%** | **50%** | ⚠️ Needs optimization |

## ⚠️ Compliance Review

### Urgent Pending Items
1. **BABA Risk Control Missing** 🔴
   - Risk Level: High (completely unprotected)
   - Action Required: Immediately set stop-loss at $128.6 and take-profit at $227 limit orders
   - Impact: Violates "must set risk control" principle

2. **ORCL Position Classification Confirmation** ⚠️
   - Issue: Whether 10% short-term portion counts toward trend position
   - Impact: Determines if trend position exceeds limit (current 10% vs 20% rule maximum)

### Rule Compliance Status
- ✅ **Single trade ≤1%**: Rule clarified, correctly understood
- ✅ **No red line violations**: No day trading, shorting, derivatives, or margin leverage
- ✅ **Limit order execution**: All positions acquired via limit orders
- ✅ **AMZN compliance**: 1% position + risk control set + lock period normal

## 🎯 Action Plan

### Short-term Actions (1-2 weeks)
- [ ] **Immediately**: Set BABA risk control orders
- [ ] **Confirm**: ORCL position classification
- [ ] **Initiate**: BABA phased accumulation plan (≤1% per trade)

### Medium-term Goals (2-8 weeks)
- [ ] **Complete**: BABA 20% target position (10% cyclical + 10% trend)
- [ ] **Establish**: SPY/QQQ 40% long-term core position
- [ ] **Optimize**: Overall asset allocation to target ratios

## 🔍 Market Risk Monitoring

### Individual Stock Risks
- **BABA**: China ADR policy uncertainty, high volatility
- **NVDA**: High valuation + technical highs, increased pullback risk
- **ORCL**: Cloud business solid but valuation not cheap

### Overall Market
- Increased volatility, execute phased accumulation cautiously
- US equities at highs, long-term accumulation should watch technical support levels

## 📝 Daily Notes
- Sunday market closed - no trading activity
- Portfolio status unchanged from 2026-02-26
- Pending actions remain: BABA risk control setup and ORCL classification
- Ready to execute user-confirmed operations
